default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration opportunities between Jem Sophia and GrowthX.ai, discussing Jem's background and GrowthX's current projects and needs.](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai is a rapidly growing, AI-native company focusing on editorial and performance marketing at scale (70 employees, $7M ARR, aiming for $20M by year-end)](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [Jem is seeking new opportunities that blend her tech expertise with creative pursuits, preferring early-stage product development (0 to 0.5) and invention-focused roles](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [While immediate roles at GrowthX might not be the best fit, there's mutual interest in staying connected for future opportunities, particularly in the software/build side of the company](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai Overview

  - [Seed-stage company with 70 employees worldwide, fully remote](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Focuses on growth, editorial, and performance marketing for fast-growing tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Uses AI-optimized workflows to scale operations](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Currently at $7M ARR, aiming for $20M by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Recently raised $12M to accelerate growth and hiring](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Two main divisions: agency-style client work and software development for internal tools](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

### Design Engineering at GrowthX

  - [Combines high-quality UI design with coding skills, often AI-assisted](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Emphasis on autonomy and cross-functional capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [No strict separation between design, engineering, and product management roles](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Current focus more on engineering skills due to early stage (no design system yet, using Tailwind components)](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Jem's Background and Career Aspirations

  - [Extensive experience in tech, including Web3 (Zora) and early AI design work (The Grid)](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [Recently took a career break to focus on music and personal transition](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Diagnosed with ADD \~10 years ago, sees potential in AI tools for neurodivergent individuals](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [Seeking roles that allow for invention and early-stage product development (0 to 0.5)](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Interested in stability but open to freelance projects](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Excited about recent advancements in AI, particularly in model context protocol and API improvements](https://fathom.video/share/2EcHEABmaD9eLsTihcZmf_WSw7a9PJTa?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)

### Current Opportunities at GrowthX
